mapper.sql: id, name, slug, product_code, short_description, description, is_active, category_id, brand_id, category_name, brand_name, thumbnail_url, price, sale_price, stock_quantity, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from products
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into products (name, slug, product_code, short_description, description, is_active, category_id, brand_id, category_name, brand_name, thumbnail_url, price, sale_price, stock_quantity, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted) values (#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{slug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shortDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isActive,jdbcType=BIT}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{brandId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brandName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thumbnailUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{salePrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{stockQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into products
name,
slug,
product_code,
short_description,
description,
is_active,
category_id,
brand_id,
category_name,
brand_name,
thumbnail_url,
price,
sale_price,
stock_quantity,
created_at,
updated_at,
created_by,
updated_by,
is_deleted,
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{slug,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{shortDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isActive,jdbcType=BIT},
#{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{brandId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{brandName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{thumbnailUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{price,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{salePrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{stockQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update:
update products
id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
name = #{row.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
slug = #{row.slug,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_code = #{row.productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
short_description = #{row.shortDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{row.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_active = #{row.isActive,jdbcType=BIT},
category_id = #{row.categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
brand_id = #{row.brandId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
category_name = #{row.categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
brand_name = #{row.brandName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
thumbnail_url = #{row.thumbnailUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{row.price,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
sale_price = #{row.salePrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
stock_quantity = #{row.stockQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
created_at = #{row.createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{row.updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
created_by = #{row.createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
updated_by = #{row.updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
is_deleted = #{row.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},

update products set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, name = #{row.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, slug = #{row.slug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_code = #{row.productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, short_description = #{row.shortDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{row.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_active = #{row.isActive,jdbcType=BIT}, category_id = #{row.categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, brand_id = #{row.brandId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, category_name = #{row.categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, brand_name = #{row.brandName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, thumbnail_url = #{row.thumbnailUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{row.price,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, sale_price = #{row.salePrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, stock_quantity = #{row.stockQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_at = #{row.createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{row.updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_by = #{row.createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, updated_by = #{row.updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, is_deleted = #{row.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}

update products
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
slug = #{slug,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_code = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
short_description = #{shortDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_active = #{isActive,jdbcType=BIT},
category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
brand_id = #{brandId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
category_name = #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
brand_name = #{brandName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
sale_price = #{salePrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
created_by = #{createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
updated_by = #{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update products set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, slug = #{slug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_code = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, short_description = #{shortDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_active = #{isActive,jdbcType=BIT}, category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, brand_id = #{brandId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, category_name = #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, brand_name = #{brandName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, sale_price = #{salePrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_by = #{createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, updated_by = #{updatedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
